ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the tournament is held */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region of the tournament */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Type of sport */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Organizing entity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the tournament */,
  "rounds" INTEGER /* Total rounds in the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the team is located */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was established */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach of the team */,
  "home_stadium" TEXT /* Home stadium of the team */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament in which the match was played */,
  "round" INTEGER /* Round number of the match */,
  "team0_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team */,
  "winner" INTEGER /* ID of the winning team */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stadium where the match was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee officiating the match */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the match */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team0_id FOREIGN KEY ("team0_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES referees ("referee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "injured" INTEGER /* Indicates if the player is currently injured */,
  "joined_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score entry */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match being scored */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team scoring */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the team */,
  "score_time" TEXT /* Time at which the score was made */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter or period in which the score was made */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who scored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournament_rounds" (
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each round */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "round_number" INTEGER /* Number of the round */,
  "round_name" TEXT /* Name or description of the round */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the round */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the round */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, coach, fan) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team statistic entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the team */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of draws by the team */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Total number of goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_conceded" INTEGER /* Total number of goals conceded by the team */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points accumulated by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match in which the event occurred */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., goal, foul) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team involved in the event */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time at which the event occurred */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player involved in the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_events_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_events_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_events_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referees" (
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the referee */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the referee */,
  "license" TEXT /* License number of the referee */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the referee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referee_id")
)
